title: Plutarch, Moralia: Sayings of the Spartans
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Sayings of the Spartans.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Sayings of the Spartans.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Sayings of the Spartans': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
